description: A dark designed graphic over a close photo of a clenched fist. Small white text at the top reads 'Assaulting a federal officer may cost you your freedom'. Large stacked type reads 'THINK' in yellow, 'BEFORE YOU' on a red bar, and 'RESIST' in white. A Department of Homeland Security seal, 'ICE' and 'ICE.gov' are at the lower right.
notable_text: Assaulting a federal officer may cost you your freedom; THINK BEFORE YOU RESIST; ICE; ICE.gov
